description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular layout, surrounded by a low boundary wall. The exterior is predominantly white with large glass windows and sliding doors, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions. The property features landscaped areas with several trees and shrubs, as well as a spacious patio with outdoor seating and a dining area. There is a driveway leading to a covered garage, and the main entrance is accentuated by tall, narrow shrubs and a small set of steps. The rear of the house includes a sunroom or conservatory and additional outdoor living spaces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection to the surrounding garden.
description: A modern, single-story white house with a flat roof, large glass windows, landscaped gardens, and multiple outdoor living areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with tall shrubs, large windows, and a central pathway leading to the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a glimpse of the outdoor dining area in the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the sunroom/conservatory, extensive glass walls, and a large patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring additional garden space, trees, and the rear outdoor seating area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small set of steps, tall narrow shrubs, and a minimalist door framed by large windows
